title: Chocobo Knights of the Crafting Table
description: This mod aims to bring the world of Final Fantasy, specifically, chocobos, to the world of Minecraft. Tame, breed, and fight with your chocobos as you make your way through the adventures that await you and your steed.
body:
Welcome to Chocobo Knights of the Crafting Table



Updated to Minecraft 1.20.1
Updated to Minecraft 26.1, 26.1.1, 26.1.2

This mod aims to bring the world of Final Fantasy, specifically, chocobos, to the world of Minecraft. Tame, breed, and fight with your chocobos as you make your way through the adventures that await you and your steed.



Features

Tame, breed, and armor various Final Fantasy themed mobs including: Chocobos, Moogles, Moombas, Tonberrys, and more.

Several new crops such as Gysahl Greens, Nuts, and Peppers.

New items and ores to uncover.

More Villager professions. 

A new structure: The Chocobo Theatre. 

A Chocobo Whistle to command your tamed creatures to Sit/Guard, Wander, Follow, Stay (Will not defend itself), and Cactuars have a turret mode. 



Chocobos



There are twelve base colors of chocobos, each with their own unique ability.



Yellow – Glide / No fall damage

Cyan – Floats on water

Green – High Step (2 blocks vs 1)

Brown – Crop harvesting

Pink – Flowers and grass grows as it walks

Silver – Can chop down trees

Black – High Jump

Blue – Dive

White – Water walk / frost boots

Purple – Water Breathing

Red – Lava immunity

Gold – Flight



More colors are available through Name Tags. These are:



PlagueDoctor

PlagueNurse

Ghost

Zombie

Turkey

Tardis

Articuno

Moltres

Zaptos

If you right click a mob with the Chocobo Field Guide chat will list all custom named items for this mob.



Chocobo Breeding

Chocobos can be bred and their abilities inherited by their offspring. Using a DNA tester allows you to test their gender and alleles (DNA markers that represent an ability). Alleles appear in pairs and can be either Homozygous (YY, yy) or Heterozygous (Yy). Think back to punnett squares from your Biology Class days.



Both Colors and Abilities have alleles. If an allele is YY, for example, the offspring are guaranteed to have the color or ability. Yy will still have the color or ability but may pass on yy which means the color or ability will be absent.

Alleles:

Yy – Yellow – Glide / No fall damage

Cc – Cyan – Floats on water

Gg – Green – High Step (2 blocks vs 1)

Bb – Brown – Crop harvesting

Pp – Pink – Flowers and grass grows as it walks

Ss – Silver – Can chop down trees

Oo – Black – High Jump

Kk – Blue – Dive

Ww – White – Water walk / frost boots

Ee – Purple – Water Breathing

Rr – Red – Lava immunity

Aa – Gold – Flight



It is possible to breed a chocobo with ALL special abilities. You will require a male and female chocobo which are discernible by their tail and head feather sizes, or from using the DNA tester. After breeding they will produce an egg that must be incubated in a chocobo nest which is created using bags of chocobo feathers.



Creature Taming, Breeding, and Healing



Different creatures require different food to tame, breed and heal.



Taming

Chocobos – Greens

Moogles – Kupo Nuts

Moombas – Ultimate Nut Butter and Jellied Greens Sandwich

Cactuar – Dead Peppers

Tonberry – Tonberry Crown (Obtained from either the Theatre or killing other Tonberrys)

Carbuncle – Huge Materia



Breeding

Chocobos – Any Nut

Moogles – Kupo Nut

Moombas – Materia

Cactuar – Flower Pot

Tonberry – Nether Wart

Carbuncle – Materia



Healing

Chocobos – Greens

Moogles – Kupo Nuts

Moombas – Meat

Cactuar – Sand

Tonberry – Chicken or Chocobo meat

Carbuncle – Materia



Gear



Create a chocobo saddle to ride your tamed steed and craft all different types of armor from Iron to Diamond and more. There are many armor types for every new mob, even Cactuar. This mod also contains many armors that use materials from MANY other mods such as Botania and Tinker’s.



Chocobo Saddle Pack:

Hold items and everything your chocobo picks up, i.e crops or wood. The level of "Efficiency" enchantment on this determines how much it can hold. Right Click while looking at a tamed chocobo to equip it.





New Villager Professions and Work Stations



Players are able to obtain various new items from these villagers. Their workstations can either be created or found inside the Chocobo Theatre that spawns in the world.

These are the new villagers and their workstations.



“Chocobo Billy” – Crate of Karbo Nuts

“Chocobo Farmer” – Crate of Dead Peppers

“Hunter” – Crate of Yellow Materia

“Kid” – Crate of Gysahl Green

“Merchant” – Huge Blue Materia Crystal

“Mog” – Crate of Kupo Nuts

“Trader” – Tonberry Crown





Huge Materia and Devil Fruits



Using a Golden Apple, Glistening Watermelon, or Golden carrots on different Huge Materias will create different Devil Fruit that can be given to chocobos to unlock abilities they don’t have. This is useful in creative or for players who don’t want to do lots of breeding, be warned though, this takes a LOT of xp.



Configurable Settings:

There are a ton. The goal is to allow everything to be configurable in the settings.

Spawn rates.

World Generation Rates

Weighting of chocobo colors

Potion Effect partials toggle.

Chocobo Stats and level ranges.





Coming Soon:

Better Chocobo Field Guide:

Book in-game that will provide all the information you could ever want involving the mod.

Creature minor pieces, like ear wiggles and such.

Achievements

More features, Code Efficiency, Feature balancing.

Make lower Resolution textures for users that want the vanilla minecraft style.

FAQ:

Can I include Chocobo Knights in my mod pack?

Of course!


PS: Better description formatting coming soon.
